zh.lifeSummary: 當García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR"於大約1238年出生在西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利時，他的父親Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor42歲，母親Urraca Pérez Barroso28歲。他於大約1254年與Ines La Gordo de Toledo在西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh-hans.Castilla la Nueva Región, España: 西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利
zh-hans.of, New Castile, Spain: 西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR"于大约1238年出生在西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利时，他的父亲Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor42岁，母亲Urraca Pérez Barroso28岁。他于大约1254年与Ines La Gordo de Toledo在西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Méndez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Raul, Jorge, Rafael.  Portuguese Ligia, Godofredo, Ilidio, Paulo, Serafim.
Galician (Méndez): patronymic from the personal name Mendo (see Mendes , of which this is the Galician equivalent).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Mandez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Galician Méndez (see Mendez ).

variants.name: Mendes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Pedro, Alberto, Sergio, Armando, Cesar, Domingos, Francisco, Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Agostinho, Amadeu, Armanda, Guilherme, Henrique, Sebastiao, Valentim.
Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the personal name Mendo, a shortened form of Menendo (see Menendez ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sotomayor,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Luis, Miguel, Manuel, Jorge, Jose, Orlando, Rafael, Raul, Javier, Lourdes.

Spanish: Castilianized form of a habitational name from either of two places in Pontevedra and Ourense provinces, Galicia, named Soutomaior, from Galician souto ‘grove, small wood’ + maior ‘larger, main’.

nameMeanings.name: "SEÑOR
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Andres, Blanca, Don Juan, Felipe, Valeria.
Spanish (Señor): nickname from the title señor‘mister’.

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: XODAR"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from a place in Galicia (Spain), so named from the Latin personal name Notarius. Compare Nodal .

variants.name: Nodal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Rafael, Armando, Blanca, Eduardo, Luis, Pedro, Raul, Ronaldo, Adelaida, Adolfo, Aleida.

Spanish and Galician: altered form of Galician   Nodar   or a habitational name from a placename in Pontevedra province, Galicia, which no longer exists. This surname is most common in Cuba and Mexico.

nameMeanings.name: García
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

variants.name: Marsha
meanings: Phonetic spelling of   Marcia  , associated particularly with the American film star  Marsha Hunt  (  b. 1917 ).

en.lifeSummary: When García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR" was born about 1238, in New Castile, Spain, his father, Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor, was 42 and his mother, Urraca Pérez Barroso, was 28. He married Ines La Gordo de Toledo about 1254, in New Castile, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR" est né environ 1238, à New Castile, Espagne, son père, Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Urraca Pérez Barroso, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Ines La Gordo de Toledo environ 1254, à New Castile, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR" um 1238 in New Castile, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor 42 und seine Mutter Urraca Pérez Barroso 28. Er hat um 1254 in New Castile, Spanien Ines La Gordo de Toledo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR" è nato il circa 1238 nel New Castile, Spagna, il suo padre, Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Urraca Pérez Barroso, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Ines La Gordo de Toledo circa 1254, nel New Castile, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR"が約1238年にスペインニュー カスティルで生まれた時，父Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayorは42歳，母Urraca Pérez Barrosoは28歳であった。約1254年にスペインニュー カスティルでInes La Gordo de Toledoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR"(이)가 대략 1238년 스페인 뉴 카스틸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Urraca Pérez Barroso(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1254년 스페인 뉴 카스틸에서 Ines La Gordo de Toledo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR" nasceu aproximadamente 1238, em New Castile, Espanha, seu pai, Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Urraca Pérez Barroso, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Ines La Gordo de Toledo aproximadamente 1254, em New Castile, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR" родился около 1238 г. в местности ню кастиль, Испания, его отцу по имени Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Urraca Pérez Barroso, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Ines La Gordo de Toledo около 1254 г. в местности ню кастиль, Испания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando García Méndez de Sotomayor, "SEÑOR DE XODAR" nació aproximadamente 1238, en New Castile, España, su papá, Conde Pedro Méndez de Sotomayor, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Urraca Pérez Barroso, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ines La Gordo de Toledo aproximadamente 1254, en New Castile, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
